summary: The diff implements REQ-2 and REQ-3 partially, with useQueries.ts polling at 10-second intervals, LiveRatesDashboard and MetalTicker showing live indicators and last-updated timestamps, and manual refresh working. However, REQ-1 (backend) is only partially implemented: the Motoko actor sets up a timer and HTTP outcall but is missing a query method to expose prices to the frontend, missing fallback values, and missing proper price storage/state. The frontend (useQueries.ts) still fetches directly from the IBJA API client-side rather than polling the backend canister actor as required by REQ-2.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend actor must expose a query method returning the latest fetched gold and silver prices (or fallback values)
missing_requirements.reason: The modified backend/main.mo has no stable variables to store fetched prices, no query method returning gold/silver prices, and no fallback values (Gold 24K Rs1,70,000/10g, Silver Rs3,09,000/kg). Only a timer setup and an HTTP outcall function are present.

missing_requirements.requirement: The transform function must correctly process IBJA HTTP responses and fallback values must be returned when API fails
missing_requirements.reason: The actor delegates to OutCall.transform without any custom IBJA response parsing logic or fallback price assignment in main.mo. There is no error-handling path that sets fallback prices.

missing_requirements.requirement: useQueries.ts must poll the backend canister actor query method for live prices, not directly call the IBJA API
missing_requirements.reason: The updated useQueries.ts still fetches directly from IBJA_RATES_URL via client-side fetch() rather than calling the backend canister actor's query method. It does not use any ICP actor or canister client.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fallback values must come from frontend/src/config/fallback.ts when the backend canister call fails
missing_requirements.reason: While FALLBACK_PRICES is imported from fallback.ts, the fallback is applied when the direct IBJA fetch fails, not when a backend canister call fails, since the canister is never called.

hallucinated_features.description: Market closed detection based on 60-minute price stagnation and IST market hours (Mon-Sat 9AM-5PM)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention market status detection, market open/closed indicators, or IST business hours logic. This logic was added in useQueries.ts and surfaced in both dashboard components.

hallucinated_features.description: Price trend tracking (up/down/neutral) with TrendingUp/TrendingDown icons in MetalTicker
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request price trend indicators or directional arrows; only a live/pulsing indicator and last-updated timestamp were requested.

hallucinated_features.description: GST breakdown display including goldWithGst, silverWithGst, goldCgst, goldSgst, silverCgst, silverSgst in MetalPrice interface and components
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention GST calculations or breakdown display as part of the auto-refresh feature requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: initialize() function requiring a manual call to start the recurring timer rather than using system-level auto-start
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a 10-second recurring timer that runs automatically; requiring an explicit initialize() call is not specified and may break the auto-start behavior.
